sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: USA Compression Partners LP Announces 2025 K-1 Tax Package Availability
feed.summary: USA Compression Partners, LP (NYSE: USAC) has announced that its 2025 K-1 tax packages are now available online at taxpackagesupport.com/usac and are also being mailed to unitholders. Unitholders can also contact Tax Package Support or visit the company's website for assistance. USA Compression is a leading independent provider of natural gas compression services, focusing on midstream applications.

feed.title: Linde (LIN) Gets Price Target Increase from BMO Capital Ahead of 2026 Outlook
feed.summary: BMO Capital analyst John McNulty has raised his price target for Linde plc (LIN) to $507 from $501, maintaining an Outperform rating. This adjustment comes as Linde enters 2026 with a robust project backlog and sustained pricing power, which are expected to counteract macroeconomic challenges and slower project ramps. Despite an "uneven" economic environment, Linde reported record annual EPS, operating cash flow, and operating margins in Q4 2025, alongside a record $10 billion project backlog.

feed.title: RCI Hospitality receives Nasdaq noncompliance notice on filings
feed.summary: RCI Hospitality Holdings, Inc. (RICK) has received a noncompliance notice from Nasdaq due to its failure to timely file its Form 10-Q and Form 10-K with the SEC. The company has until March 31, 2026, to file the reports or submit a compliance plan, with a potential extension to June 29, 2026. This notice comes amidst a period of leadership transitions and a slight decrease in sales for the fiscal first quarter of 2026, though InvestingPro analysis suggests the stock is undervalued.

feed.title: SEC Charges ADM and Three Former Executives with Accounting and Disclosure Fraud
feed.summary: The SEC has charged Archer Daniels Midland (ADM) and three former executives with accounting and disclosure fraud, alleging they inflated earnings and manipulated financial statements. This action highlights concerns about corporate governance and the importance of ethical practices, leading to a decline in ADM's stock price and heightening regulatory scrutiny within the industry. The case serves as a powerful reminder for companies to maintain rigorous ethical standards and transparency to prevent financial misconduct and restore investor trust.

feed.title: Sibanye Stillwater Stock Sinks Again: Bargain Gold Play or Value Trap for US Investors?
feed.summary: Sibanye Stillwater's stock has heavily underperformed despite strong gold prices, primarily due to struggles in the platinum group metals (PGM) market, rising costs, and labor risks. While it trades at a significant discount to its net asset value, US investors face high risk, betting on PGM recovery, successful restructuring, and stable South African operations. The company's dividend is also less reliable, making it a speculative play for those comfortable with high volatility and emerging market risks.

feed.title: RTW INVESTMENTS, LP Acquires Additional Shares in Tenax Therapeu
feed.summary: RTW INVESTMENTS, LP increased its stake in Tenax Therapeutics Inc. by acquiring an additional 272,622 shares on December 31, 2025, bringing its total holdings to 650,968 shares. This strategic move, valued at $12.19 per share, reflects RTW's confidence in the specialty pharmaceutical company despite its current financial challenges. Tenax Therapeutics Inc. focuses on cardiovascular and pulmonary diseases and is advancing clinical trials for levosimendan, aligning with RTW INVESTMENTS, LP's healthcare-focused investment strategy.

feed.title: Blackstone's (BX) Perpetual Private Equity Strategy Fund To Acquire Champions Group
feed.summary: Blackstone Inc. (BX) announced that its perpetual private equity strategy fund has entered into an agreement to acquire Champions Group, a prominent home services company. This acquisition, expected to close in the first half of 2026, aligns with Blackstone's strategy to expand into a multi-service powerhouse and build platforms in fragmented industries like home services. Champions Group offers essential residential services with over 1,800 field technicians and 150,000 active members.

feed.title: Ingersoll Rand (NYSE:IR) Insider Vicente Reynal Sells 900 Shares
feed.summary: Ingersoll Rand (NYSE:IR) insider Vicente Reynal sold 900 shares of the company's stock for $90,000 on February 18th, reducing his direct ownership to 193,186 shares. This latest transaction is part of a series of insider sales by Reynal and other senior executives in February, which MarketBeat identifies as a key factor in recent downward pressure on the stock despite strong Q4 earnings and positive FY2026 guidance. The company also announced a quarterly dividend and analysts maintain a "Hold" consensus rating with an average price target of $101.86.

This sale reduced his position by 9.94%. The company also recently announced a quarterly dividend of $0.30 per share and current stock performance shows a 1.9% decrease.

feed.title: Lockheed Martin (NYSE:LMT) Trading Down 1.3% - Here's What Happened
feed.summary: Lockheed Martin (NYSE:LMT) shares experienced a 1.3% decline on Friday, trading down to $658.1020 on lower-than-average volume. This occurred despite several analysts raising their price targets, though the company still holds a consensus "Hold" rating with an average target of $612.50. The aerospace company recently reported mixed quarterly results, missing EPS estimates but surpassing revenue expectations, and declared a quarterly dividend of $3.45 per share.

feed.title: ‘Consequences of poor planning’: Gallatin family still fighting after TVA pauses plan to run transmission line through their farm
feed.summary: An eighth-generation farming family in Gallatin, TN, along with country musician John Rich and a Sumner County Commissioner, continues to fight against the Tennessee Valley Authority's (TVA) proposed transmission line through their historic land, despite the TVA announcing a "pause" on the project. The family highlights the farm's cultural and educational value, including a farm school for children, which would be severely impacted. The TVA has stated its intention to form a "Landowner Task Force" to involve community voices and balance energy needs with property rights, though critics believe this pause may be a tactic to wait out public outcry.

feed.title: Hood River Capital Management LLC Reduces Stake in Comstock Inc
feed.summary: Hood River Capital Management LLC reduced its stake in Comstock Inc by selling 17,880 shares on December 31, 2025, at $3.76 per share. Despite the reduction, Comstock Inc still represents 0.08% of the firm's portfolio. Comstock Inc, trading at $3.15, has a GF Value of $3.47 and focuses on converting natural resources into renewable fuels and metals, but faces financial challenges including negative profitability metrics.

feed.summary: RAFFLES ASSOCIATES LP reduced its stake in Provident Financial Holdings Inc by 552 shares on December 31, 2025, a 0.14% change, to 391,239 shares, now comprising 5.8% of its portfolio. Provident Financial Holdings Inc (NASDAQ: PROV) is valued at $16.25 and is considered fairly valued with a GF Score of 69/100, indicating poor future performance potential.

feed.title: Insider Sell: Sweetnam Jordan Douglas Bradley Sells 1,009 Shares of eBay Inc (EBAY)
feed.summary: Sweetnam Jordan Douglas Bradley, Senior Vice President and Chief Commercial Officer at eBay Inc (EBAY), sold 1,009 shares of the company on February 18, 2026. feed.title: Pentair Stock Is Quietly Becoming a Clean-Water Power Play
feed.summary: Pentair plc (PNR) is highlighted as a significant, yet often overlooked, player in the clean-water and climate-tech sector. The article suggests that while focus is often on AI, EVs, and crypto, substantial investment is flowing into water infrastructure, positioning Pentair as a key US-facing name in this shift. With strong North American exposure, a healthy balance sheet, and a focus on essential infrastructure like pool equipment and industrial filtration, Pentair offers a stable investment opportunity aligned with long-term trends in water scarcity and climate resilience.

feed.title: Dropbox Q4 2025 revenue hit by FormSwift as focus shifts to AI search tool Dash
feed.summary: Dropbox's Q4 2025 revenue was impacted by its document service FormSwift, which will be sunset by the end of 2026 as the company pivots to its AI search tool, Dash. Although FormSwift acted as a "modest headwind," Dropbox exceeded its overall revenue guidance. The company is actively integrating Dash into its core offerings and scaling its rollout to drive adoption, expecting full-year 2026 revenue between $2.485 billion and $2.5 billion.

feed.title: Herbalife Stock Surges 18% After Earnings Beat. Here’s What Changed
feed.summary: Herbalife (HLF) stock surged 18.32% after reporting fourth-quarter results that surpassed expectations, with adjusted EPS of $0.45 and net sales up 6.3% to $1.3 billion. The positive investor sentiment was further fueled by Cristiano Ronaldo's $7.5 million strategic investment and 10% equity stake in Herbalife’s Pro2col™ technology, aligning with the company's expansion into personalized nutrition. Despite analyst price targets averaging $14.25 below the current share price and a leveraged balance sheet, investors are focusing on near-term earnings stability and strong operating profitability, with analysts forecasting a 19.5% forward EPS CAGR.

feed.title: Verizon Communications (NYSE:VZ) Trading Up 1.2% - Here's Why
feed.summary: Verizon Communications (NYSE:VZ) shares rose 1.2% to $49.24 on Friday with analysts maintaining a "Moderate Buy" consensus and an average price target of $49.02. The company recently beat Q4 earnings estimates, issued strong FY2026 EPS guidance, and increased its quarterly dividend to $0.7075, resulting in a 5.7% yield. Notably, an EVP sold a portion of their holdings, while institutional investors have adjusted their stakes in Verizon.

feed.title: Eli Lilly and Company (NYSE:LLY) Stock Price Down 1.4% - Here's Why
feed.summary: Eli Lilly and Company (LLY) shares were down 1.4% in midday trading due to concerns about valuation and concentration in GLP-1/weight-loss drugs, leading to profit-taking. Despite this, the company reported positive long-term Phase 3 data for Omvoh, additional trial wins (Zepbound-Taltz), and a strong Q4 beat with raised FY2026 EPS guidance. Analysts have increased price targets, and Eli Lilly boosted its quarterly dividend, maintaining high institutional ownership.

feed.title: RR (Richtech Robotics NASDAQ) $2.78 20 Feb 2026 market closed: lawsuit clouds RR stock upside
feed.summary: Richtech Robotics (RR) closed at $2.78 on February 20, 2026, experiencing volatility due to legal issues, specifically a class-action lawsuit concerning a disputed Microsoft collaboration claim. Despite a "HOLD" rating from Meyka AI and a projected yearly price of $6.99, the stock faces significant risks from ongoing litigation, reputational damage, and negative operating margins. The company exhibits strong cash per share and a cash-heavy balance sheet, but weak revenue and profitability metrics currently weigh on its valuation.

feed.title: Misleading government publication causes confusion for investors over future of Musselwhite gold mine
feed.summary: A Canadian government publication incorrectly stated that the Shibogama First Nations Council was considering purchasing the Musselwhite gold mine, causing confusion for investors and owner Orla Mining Ltd. The publication has since been quietly updated after Orla Mining, which bought the mine in 2025, clarified it had no intention of selling. The First Nations council confirmed they had considered purchasing the mine in 2024 but decided not to proceed.

The stock is currently trading at $307.03, which is significantly above its GF Value of $191.93, indicating it is overvalued.

feed.title: ROSEN, LEADING TRIAL ATTORNEYS, Encourages Vistagen Therapeutics, Inc. Investors to Secure ...
feed.summary: The Rosen Law Firm is encouraging investors of Vistagen Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ: VTGN) to secure legal counsel as a class action lawsuit has been filed. The firm is seeking to represent investors who purchased Vistagen common stock between April 1, 2022, and December 16, 2023, alleging that misleading statements regarding the company's drug development caused investor damages. Investors have until March 16, 2026, to move for lead plaintiff.

feed.title: First Bancorp (NASDAQ:FBNC) Reaches New 52-Week High - Should You Buy?
feed.summary: First Bancorp (NASDAQ:FBNC) recently hit a new 52-week high of $62.64, closing at $62.27 with significant trading volume. Despite mixed analyst ratings, the consensus remains a "Moderate Buy" with a target price of $61.25. The company exceeded EPS expectations but missed on revenue, raised its quarterly dividend, and has seen recent insider selling.

This sale follows several other significant insider sales by Fisher this winter. The company recently reported strong quarterly results, beating analyst expectations for EPS and revenue, and authorized a $400 million share repurchase program.

feed.title: Roger R. Argus appointed CEO and director at Tetra Tech
feed.summary: Tetra Tech (TTEK) has appointed Roger R. Argus as its new Chief Executive Officer and added him to the company's Board of Directors, effective February 19, 2026. Argus has been with the company for over 30 years, previously serving as President since October 2025, among other executive roles. This appointment follows his previously announced promotion to CEO.

feed.title: Tandem Diabetes Shares Rise 33% On Earnings Beat, Margin Expansion, Growth Outlook
feed.summary: Tandem Diabetes Care (NASDAQ: TNDM) saw its shares surge by 33% after reporting a smaller-than-expected adjusted loss and sales that beat consensus in the fourth quarter. The company also announced an improved adjusted gross profit and operating profit, along with strategic plans for future growth including a "pay-as-you-go" model in the U.S. and a commitment to expand pump shipment growth in 2026. Despite a sales forecast slightly below consensus for fiscal 2026, management expects accelerated growth in 2027 and beyond, leading to positive analyst actions.

feed.title: Jabil, Coherent, TTM Technologies, First Advantage, and Taboola Shares Are Soaring, What You Need To Know
feed.summary: Shares of Jabil, Coherent, TTM Technologies, First Advantage, and Taboola surged after the U.S. Supreme Court struck down the Trump administration's global tariffs, easing financial strain on corporations. TTM Technologies, in particular, saw significant gains, with its shares highly volatile and up 52.9% year-to-date, reaching a new 52-week high after reports suggested it would benefit from Alphabet's expanded AI infrastructure spending. The ruling provided a wave of relief to markets, with the S&P 500 and Dow Jones Industrial Average both climbing.

feed.title: Telkom Ungkap Mulai Proses Gandeng Mitra Global untuk Pengembangan Bisnis Data Center
feed.summary: PT Telkom Indonesia (Persero) Tbk. (TLKM) plans to partner with a global player to develop its data center business, aiming to bring new technologies, attract large clients like hyperscalers, and secure investments. Telkom acknowledges the rapid growth in data center demand, especially due to AI acceleration, but recognizes the significant investment and long payback periods involved. Despite these challenges, Telkom views the data center business as strategic, complementing its digital infrastructure portfolio and crucial for its digital service ecosystem, though it requires global partners for substantial expansion.

feed.title: Stantec Stock Near Highs: Still Undervalued vs. US Peers?
feed.summary: Stantec Inc. is trading near its 52-week highs after reporting strong earnings and raising its dividend. Analysts believe the Canadian engineering firm remains undervalued when compared to larger U.S.-listed peers like AECOM and Jacobs, offering an attractive opportunity for investors seeking exposure to North American infrastructure and water spending. The article analyzes the drivers behind Stantec's performance, its competitive positioning, and potential risks, concluding that it serves as a defensive yet growth-oriented investment for long-term infrastructure bulls.

feed.title: IRIDEX (IRIX): Why This Micro-Cap Laser Stock Just Spiked – And What’s Next
feed.summary: IRIDEX (IRIX), a micro-cap ophthalmic laser stock, saw its shares spike after announcing an all-cash acquisition by Topcon Corporation. The stock still trades at a discount to the offer price, creating a merger-arbitrage opportunity with inherent risks if the deal fails or is delayed. Investors must weigh the potential upside against these risks, as the stock's future is now tied to the deal's certainty rather than its long-term fundamentals.

feed.title: Southern Company Earnings Call Signals Data-Driven Surge
feed.summary: Southern Company's Q4 earnings call highlighted strong earnings growth, rising power demand fueled by data centers, and upgraded long-term guidance. The company projects significant EPS growth, increased retail electricity sales, and an expanded $81 billion capital plan to meet surging demand. While acknowledging cost pressures and execution risks, management's detailed strategy and balance sheet planning aim to support sustained growth for shareholders.

feed.title: ROSEN, NATIONAL TRIAL LAWYERS, Encourages uniQure N.V. Investors to Secure Counsel Before Important Deadline in Securities Class Action - QURE
feed.summary: The Rosen Law Firm is reminding uniQure N.V. investors who purchased shares between September 24, 2025, and October 31, 2025, of the April 13, 2026, lead plaintiff deadline for a securities class action lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges that uniQure (NASDAQ: QURE) misrepresented or failed to disclose that its Pivotal Study design for a Huntington's Disease drug was not fully FDA-approved and that the company downplayed the need for additional studies, leading to investor damages. Investors are encouraged to contact the firm for more information on joining the lawsuit.

feed.title: POSCO (NYSE:PKX) Hits New 1-Year High - Here's Why

The South Korea-based integrated steel producer, with a market cap near $20.9 billion, last traded at $68.83, up 2.6%.

feed.title: Bitcoin price jumps toward $68,000 as tariff ruling lifts risk mood; ETF outflows linger
feed.summary: Bitcoin's price increased by about 1.6% to $68,015, supported by a U.S. Supreme Court ruling that struck down tariffs, which positively impacted broader risk assets including stocks and crypto-linked shares. This rise occurred despite persistent outflows from U.S. spot Bitcoin ETFs and concerns over inflation data. Traders are also factoring in upcoming economic data and Nvidia's quarterly results, which could further influence market sentiment.

feed.title: Carnival Cruise Line Merges Stock Listings, Moves Operations to Bermuda
feed.summary: Carnival Corporation announced a major reorganization, combining its New York and London stock listings into a single unified structure based on the New York Stock Exchange. The company will also relocate its corporate headquarters from Panama to Bermuda and operate as "Carnival Corporation Ltd." This move follows strong financial performance and a significant rise in its share price over the past year.

feed.title: DXP Enterprises, Inc. Announces Fourth Quarter and Fiscal 2025 Earnings Release and Conference Call

The company will host a conference call and webcast on Thursday, February 26th, at 10:30 AM Central Time to discuss the results. Interested participants can find the webcast and accompanying materials on the "Investor Relations" section of DXP's website.
